A_storm_alert.name: Storm Alert
A_storm_alert.use_case: First ad to fire after a storm. Direct response, urgency-driven.

creative.headline: Hail Damage in {CITY}? Free Roof Inspection
creative.primary_text:
{CITY} was just hit by {HAIL_SIZE} inch hail. If you're in {ZIP_CODES}, your roof likely took damage you can't see from the ground.

Gates Enterprises has completed 7,200+ roofs across the Front Range. We assist you through the insurance claims process.

4x manufacturer certified. 308 Google reviews. 4.9 stars.

Book your free inspection today.
creative.description: Free storm damage inspections. Insurance claims assistance.

A_storm_alert.recommended_image: Storm damage close-up or hail on roof. Real Gates project photo preferred.

B_social_proof.name: Social Proof
B_social_proof.use_case: Builds trust. Run alongside Template A for broader reach.

creative.headline: 306 Reviews. 7,200+ Roofs. Storm Season Is Here.
creative.primary_text:
Your neighbors in {CITY} trust Gates Enterprises for storm damage inspections and full roof replacements. We're the only roofer in Colorado with all four major manufacturer certifications.

Free inspections. No obligation. We assist you through the insurance claims process.

Don't wait until the damage gets worse.
creative.description: Trusted by Colorado homeowners. 4x manufacturer certified.

B_social_proof.recommended_image: Team photo, completed roof, or before/after. Shows professionalism.

C_insurance_focus.name: Insurance Focus
C_insurance_focus.use_case: Targets homeowners worried about insurance. Run days 2-5 after storm.

creative.headline: Storm Damage? Free Inspection. We Help.
creative.primary_text:
After the recent hail in {CITY}, your roof may have hidden damage that could lead to leaks — and the longer you wait, the worse it gets.

Gates Enterprises offers free inspections and assists you through the insurance claims process. From inspection to installation, we make it simple.

7,200+ roofs completed. 308 reviews. 4.9 stars.
creative.description: Insurance claims assistance. From inspection to installation.

C_insurance_focus.recommended_image: Inspector on roof or insurance paperwork with Gates branding.

D_urgency_deadline.name: Urgency/Deadline
D_urgency_deadline.use_case: Late-stage urgency. Run days 5-10 to capture procrastinators.

creative.headline: Insurance Claims Have Deadlines. Don't Wait.
creative.primary_text:
If your roof was damaged in the recent {CITY} hail storm, you have a limited window to file an insurance claim.

Gates Enterprises offers free storm damage inspections and assists you through the claims process. We've completed 7,200+ roofs. 308 reviews. 4.9 stars.

Schedule your free inspection before the deadline passes.
creative.description: Limited time to file insurance claims. Free inspections available.

D_urgency_deadline.recommended_image: Damaged roof with visible hail impact. Conveys urgency.

placeholders.{ZIP_CODES}: Comma-separated zip codes for the city (e.g., 80201, 80202, 80203)

text_limits.primary_text: 125 chars visible before 'See More' (full text up to 2200)
text_limits.headline: 40 chars recommended (max 255)

best_practices: Use real Gates project photos, not stock
Show actual storm damage for authenticity
Include Gates logo in image when possible
Before/after photos perform best for engagement
Video of inspection process gets highest conversion if available
